crown.description: Required to promote a hearthling into a King

king.title: King
king.description: The ruler of a kingdom. The very presence of Royalty boosts the morale of their Hearthlings

talisman.description: Required to promote a hearthling into a King

royal_defense_buff.description: Your King and Queen has seen to the defense of this kingdom. Hearthlings gain a small defense buff

aristocrat_buff.description: This Hearthling is an Aristocrat. Look how they walk with pride.

noble_birth_buff.description: The Nobility of a King and Queen motivates all. In their presence Muscle, Speed and Stamina is greatly increased. Look sharp!

love_of_the_people_buff.description: The King and Queen hold the love of the people. Spreading happiness wherever they go.

royal_heart_buff.description: Your King and Queen increases the courage, willpower and compassion of their subjects.

royal_protocol_buff.description: There is certain way things must be done. The King and Queen increases the inspriation of all Hearthlings in their presence.
